Localization.Description: Updating the PostgreSQL database configuration can impact the security parameters of the data stored

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.application.account.name} updated the PostgreSQL database configuration using an SQL command on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed configuration file {object.name} of the PostgreSQL database on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed configuration file {object.name} of the PostgreSQL database, and database user {subject.application.account.name} applied these changes on host {event_src.host}
